name: Woodcock Legs Sauteed in Garlic Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and oil together in a heavy-bottomed skillet.
2. Stir in the garlic and cook for one minute, ensuring it does not burn.
3. Add the woodcock legs to the skillet.
4. Cook the legs for two to three minutes on each side, turning them once to ensure even browning.
5. Do not cook for more than five or six minutes total.
